name: search
description: Perform web search using local SearXNG instance. Aggregates results from Google, Bing, Brave, Startpage, DuckDuckGo, and Wikipedia simultaneously. Automatically falls back to Wikipedia + GitHub APIs if SearXNG is unavailable. Use for general web searches when the agent needs to look up information, verify facts, or find documentation.

name: install_searxng
description: Install SearXNG on a fresh Ubuntu 22.04/24.04 VPS or server. This command sets up a self-hosted search aggregator that queries multiple search engines without API keys. The installation creates a searxng system user, writes configuration to /etc/searxng/settings.yml, and starts a systemd service on http://127.0.0.1:8888. Use when setting up a new OpenClaw agent instance or when the agent needs web search capability but no SearXNG instance exists.
